scenario.name: Simple Appointment Scheduling
scenario.persona: Carlos Godinez, 24 years old, DOB March 15 2001. Normal patient, first time calling.
scenario.goal: Schedule a routine checkup appointment for next Monday or Tuesday morning.

history.content: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.  Thank you for calling good at Point Orthopedics.  Would you like to create a demo patient profile? I just need your first and last name to get started.
Hi, my name is Carlos Godinez.
I can help with that to schedule your appointment. You'll need a demo patient profile. Would you like to create 1? Now, I just need your first and last name.
Your patient profile is set up in your date of birth is July 4th 2000 for demo purposes.  How can I help you today?
Actually, my date of birth is March 15, 2001. I'd like to schedule a routine checkup for next Monday or Tuesday morning, please.
We have morning openings for routine checkups. Next, Monday and Tuesday, would you like to see times with Dr? Ziggy lucosky, or do you have another provider in mind?
Dr. Ziggy Lucosky works for me. What times are available?
Next Monday, June 29th with Dr. Zaid big new lassi. There are openings at 3 p.m. and 3:30 p.m. Would you like to book 1 of these or would you like to hear about Tuesday Morning options?
I was hoping for a morning appointment. Could you tell me about Tuesday morning options?

Tuesday, June 30th with Dr. Z big new Lakosky the earliest openings are at 3 p.m. and 3:30 p.m. there are no morning slots available that day. Would you like to book 1 of these or check another day for a morning appointment?
Could we check for a morning appointment on the following Monday, please?
Monday, July 6th with Dr. Zidu Lukowski. There are mourning openings at 9:00 a.m. 9:30 a.m. and 10:00 a.m. Would you like to book 1 of these times?
Yes, I'll take the 9:00 a.m. slot on July 6th. Thank you!

Your routine checkup is booked for Monday. July 6th at 9:00 a.m. with Dr. Zoobug new lucosky at Pivot Point Orthopedics, please bring your photo ID, insurance card, a list of your current medications and any Imaging discs you have. Would you like a text message with your appointment details?
Yes, that would be great. Thank you for your help!
You're all set have a great day.
